name: City Station
description: City Station is a place to play pickleball in Carrollton, GA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include water and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Fairfield Plantation
description: Come play pickleball at Fairfield Plantation in Villa Rica, GA! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Gold Dust Park
description: Gold Dust Park is a place to play pickleball in Villa Rica, GA. There are 9 hard courts. 6 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Lakeshore  Park and Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lakeshore Park and Recreation Center in Carrollton, GA! There are 13 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Longview Park
description: Longview Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carrollton, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Oak Mountain Pickleball Courts
description: Oak Mountain Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Carrollton, GA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include food and restrooms. The courts are private.

name: PATL
description: Come play pickleball at PATL in Carrollton, GA! There are 19 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. Reservations are available.

name: Sunset Hills Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Sunset Hills Country Club in Carrollton, GA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Tabernacle Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Tabernacle Baptist Church in Carrollton, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to water and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Villa Rica Parks & Recreation
